detectors.description:
Reentrancy in TTATDao._transfer(address,address,uint256) (TTATDao.sol#643-767):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (TTATDao.sol#707)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (TTATDao.sol#781-793)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (TTATDao.sol#713)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (TTATDao.sol#801)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TTATDao.sol#765)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (TTATDao.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (TTATDao.sol#907)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (TTATDao.sol#909)
	TTATDao._rOwned (TTATDao.sol#319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TTATDao._takeTeam(uint256) (TTATDao.sol#921-929)
	- TTATDao._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (TTATDao.sol#881-917)
	- TTATDao.balanceOf(address) (TTATDao.sol#469-473)
	- TTATDao.constructor() (TTATDao.sol#403-433)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TTATDao.sol#765)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (TTATDao.sol#935)
	TTATDao._rTotal (TTATDao.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TTATDao._getCurrentSupply() (TTATDao.sol#1077-1087)
	- TTATDao._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (TTATDao.sol#933-939)
	- TTATDao.constructor() (TTATDao.sol#403-433)
	- TTATDao.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (TTATDao.sol#565-587)

		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](TTATDao.sol#L909)
	[TTATDao._rOwned](TTATDao.sol#L319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [TTATDao._takeTeam(uint256)](TTATDao.sol#L921-L929)
	- [TTATDao._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](TTATDao.sol#L881-L917)
	- [TTATDao.balanceOf(address)](TTATDao.sol#L469-L473)
	- [TTATDao.constructor()](TTATDao.sol#L403-L433)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](TTATDao.sol#L765)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](TTATDao.sol#L935)
	[TTATDao._rTotal](TTATDao.sol#L331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [TTATDao._getCurrentSupply()](TTATDao.sol#L1077-L1087)
	- [TTATDao._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](TTATDao.sol#L933-L939)
